name: Digit Factory
short_description: 《Digit Factory》 is a game that allows you to give full play to your creativity and enjoy the fun of thinking. Design your own pipeline to perform calculations on various combinations of numbers. In the endless demand, find a design that responds to changes with the same. Come , challenge your mind!
detailed_description:
One transofrom to two，two transofrm to three , everything comes back to one


《Digit Factory》 is a thinking game that combines conveyor belt with digital computing and logical computing, allowing you to give full play to your creativity and enjoy the fun of thinking.

Career pattern

Design your own automatic pipeline, and start various mathematical operations and logical judgments on the number 1 to obtain the number required by the number center. By completing different requirements to unlock various functional equipment to enrich the design of the assembly line, it can even develop into a fully automatic digital production factory.

Challenge Mode

Use the limited functional equipment to transfer the specified number to the target device in the limited space, so as to unlock the more challenging level.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal
